task_completion.description: Open the main menu in Avare
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Avare main menu, options panel, or navigation drawer expanded.
Screenshot shows the 'Preferences' or 'Settings' screen of the Avare app.
Screenshot shows the settings sub-menu (e.g., Display or Map settings) with the 'Track Up' option visible on screen.
Screenshot shows the 'Track Up' option explicitly toggled on, checked, or selected in the UI.

task_completion.description: Return to the main map view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the primary Avare map view, confirming the agent has exited the preferences menu.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to change the setting
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Avare app UI, not a terminal emulator or ADB shell executing commands to modify settings.

integrity.description: Agent did not edit the preferences XML file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show a text editor or file manager opening the com.ds.avare_preferences.xml file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Avare application
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the standard Avare aviation GPS application, not a web browser search or a different application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires enabling the 'TrackUp' setting in the Avare app. In the Android SharedPreferences, this corresponds to setting the boolean key 'TrackUp' to 'true'. Visually, the VLM should look for a setting labeled 'Track Up' in the app's Preferences (likely under Display or Map settings) and verify it is checked or toggled on. The final state must be the main map view.
